mentions.note: Warren Buffett stepping down will bore holders; insurance/reinsurance/oil-gas/railroad mosaic intact. Perceived as reliant on Buffett's mystique rather than autonomous growth; holders may retire with him.
Underperforming despite Occidental Petroleum, Chevron holdings; Buffett premium gone post-succession. Market moving without founder conviction; not participating in oil rally.
Recommended alternative to standalone insurance plays; diversified insurance exposure through GEICO and other holdings.
Down 12% since Buffett retirement; hold one year before judgment; watch philanthropic selling impact on value.
Underperformed S&P 500 by 45% over 12 months but assets are second-to-none; Greg Abel strong hand; don't sell now.
